title: Pavetta lasioclada
intro: Pavetta lasioclada is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a medicinal plant in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its use in treating various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions. Bioactive constituents of Pavetta lasioclada include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which have been identified as responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Pavetta lasioclada is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are employed to treat a range of health conditions.

uses: Pavetta lasioclada, also known as the African or Indian woodruff, is a plant species with potential medicinal properties.
